Video.summary: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount.
Video.title: Minutes of Fame

Video.summary: The new truck arrives, fueling the growing feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.
Video.title: New Truck Day

Video.summary: After Froy's injury on a repo, tensions between Lou and Matt reach new heights.
Video.title: A Blow to the Head

Video.summary: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a strain on the company.
Video.title: Burning Up

Video.summary: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.
Video.title: The Rift

Video.summary: On this season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member.
Video.title: The Final Shot

Video.summary: On this season premiere, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn.
Video.title: The Road to Recovery

Video.summary: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor.
Video.title: Monk in the Trunk

Video.summary: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia puts herself on the business end of a knife.
Video.title: Super-Sonia

Video.summary: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist.
Video.title: Interview with the Repo Man

Video.summary: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect?
Video.title: Disaster at the Derby

Video.summary: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences.
Video.title: The Trouble with Tractors

Video.summary: Matt and Froy crash a meeting to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle.
Video.title: Welcome Back Rotter

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy disrupt a wild debtor, clash with workers, and face a repo that ends in destruction.
Video.title: Crunch Time

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia repo from yuppie; Sonia, Matt, Froy reclaim from hippie; Matt, Sonia confront fire dancers.
Video.title: Playing with Fire

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors.
Video.title: All the Wrong Moves

Video.summary: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck.
Video.title: Heart Attack Panic

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of stargazers.
Video.title: Sting Operation Blues

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders.
Video.title: Highway To Be Anger-Prone

Video.summary: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off.
Video.title: Airplane Arrest

Video.summary: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets.
Video.title: Secrets and Lies

Video.summary: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's lack of knowledge sets the bus ablaze.
Video.title: The Showstopper

Video.summary: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos.
Video.title: Nursery Crime

Video.summary: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team tries to convince him to hire a lawyer.
Video.title: Call for Help

Video.summary: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected.
Video.title: The Big Letdown

Video.summary: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer, he considers taking matters into his own hands.
Video.title: The Waiting Game

Video.summary: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse.
Video.title: Knife Week

Video.summary: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts.
Video.title: Think, Adapt and Attack

Video.summary: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous.
Video.title: Cement Mixer

Video.summary: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies.
Video.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose

Image.alt: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose

Video.summary: Lou and Matt expose a cheating husband's scheme, repossess a drunk debtor's car, and confront an armed driver.
Video.title: Involuntary Voluntary

Video.summary: Lou faces his toughest loss, repossessing a truck, a tricked-out bus, and tracking a debtor to a junkyard.
Video.title: The Crush

Video.summary: With their truck gone, the team fights on—repossessing a van, facing a wild baker.
Video.title: Daddy's Little Girl

Video.summary: With Matt onboard, the team repos a rich kid’s ride, an "Uncle Sam" vehicle, and battles rowdy rugby players.
Video.title: The Junior Partner

Video.summary: Lou & Froy bait a debtor, face pepper spray, crash a wedding for a DJ's car, & confront bikers.
Video.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake

Video.summary: Lou & Lyndah repo a mower, Sonia & Matt face heat & elderly debtors, & a shocking secret is found in a car.
Video.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down

Video.summary: Lou & Lyndah face drunk outdoorsmen, Froy & Lyndah repo a bad guitarist, and Froy & Sonia confront an ex-NFL.
Video.title: The Car That Rolled Away

Video.summary: Sonia & Lyndah repo a hot tub, Lou & Matt face angry paraders, and Lou & Lyndah take a car from old men.
Video.title: Naked and Dangerous

Video.summary: A pan-wielding housewife fights Lou & Sonia, while Matt & Froy’s repo of a contraband-filled truck goes wrong.
Video.title: Hooligans and Explosions

Video.summary: Froy & Sonia repo a Corvette, Matt & Froy face feuding brothers, & Lou & Matt take a bus from a baseball team
Video.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education

Video.summary: Lou, Matt & Froy retry a bus repo & take a crane, while Sonia & Froy are chased by bikers to the office.
Video.title: Heavy Hitters

Video.summary: Sonia & Matt face skaters, Froy & Sonia repo from a volatile couple, & Lou & Froy take on backyard wrestlers.
Video.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers

Video.summary: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck.
Video.title: Everybody Just a Child?

Video.summary: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything.
Video.title: Off the Hitch

Video.summary: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car.
Video.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery

Video.summary: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center.
Video.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some

Video.summary: Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered.
Video.title: We Weren't Informed

Video.summary: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away.
Video.title: Tijuana Surprise

Video.summary: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip.
Video.title: Lyndah's Revenge

Video.summary: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police.
Video.title: El Prisionero

Video.summary: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay.
Video.title: The Final Showdown

Video.summary: Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever.
Video.title: What the Truck?!?

Video.summary: After reclaiming their stolen truck, the repo team struggles to keep their fragile alliance intact.
Video.title: Contact

Video.summary: Take a look inside the fast-paced, high pressure world of car repossession with highly trained professionals.
Video.title: Hard Turns Ahead

Video.summary: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughter's aid on another job.
Video.title: Getting the Axe
